title: Sarakka Lyrics Maalai Nerathu Mayakkam Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Maalai Nerathu Mayakkam Sarakka Song Lyrics
Singer: Amrit
Music: Amrit
Lyrics : Vivek, Amrit

Sarakka konjam irakki
avala marakka paakkuren.
yaarum illaa kadayil
yen naan tea-ya aathuren

en manasa
puyal pol alichu
en nee usuppa yethura

kaaththaadi
polirukka venum
romba sugamaa.
summa irundha enna
yen kattivacha engamma.

arranged marriage
romba romba galeeju.
manoja saroja
thevayilla yenakku

Sarakka konjam irakki
avala marakka paakkuren.
yaarum illaa kadayil
yen naan tea-ya aathuren

thaththalikkum
meenapola pithupudichu
naan vaththi ponen.

verumilla
veraarumilla thani
maramaa ingae
naan nikkureney.

nee nadamaadum
aappu kada
unnaalathaan
pochu vadai.

yen heartula
otta poata.
ippa aayitaen
fullaa matta.

matrimoney sitekula
matter onnum illa illa.

arranged
arranged marriage
romba romba galeeju.
manoja saroja
thevayilla yenakku.

Punpaduthum jenmamadaa
munjamin vangi
usaar aavudaa.

oru maalai nerathu
mayakkathinaal
saagumvarai
marana thandanayaa

yen vazhkayila
aadiputtaa
idhu IPL
tournamentaa

ull kaaya paduthiputtaa
sandhi sirikkathaan
vachchiputtaa

jaadhakaththa
parthu parthu
araajagam panraalunga

arranged
arranged marriage
romba romba galeeju.
manoja saroja
thevayilla unakku.

Sarakka konjam irakki
avala marakka paakkuren.
yaarum illaa kadayil
yen naan tea-ya aathuren

en manasa
puyal pol alichu
en nee usuppa yethura

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Sarakka?

The song Sarakka expresses feelings of longing and affection, capturing the essence of romantic emotions.

What is the plot context of the movie Maalai Nerathu Mayakkam?

Maalai Nerathu Mayakkam revolves around themes of love and relationships, where the song plays a significant role in conveying the protagonist's emotions.

Who is the singer and music director of Sarakka?

The song is sung and composed by Amrit, who also contributed to the lyrics along with Vivek.

When was the song Sarakka released?

Sarakka was released on January 5, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Sarakka, the protagonist expresses deep feelings of love and longing, beautifully encapsulated through Amrit's emotive vocals. The song serves as a poignant backdrop in Maalai Nerathu Mayakkam, highlighting the complexities of romantic relationships. Its soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia and yearning. This track resonates with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet nature of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Sarakka from the movie Maalai Nerathu Mayakkam is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of longing and romance. With Amrit's soulful voice and heartfelt lyrics, this song takes listeners on an emotional journey. Experience the unique blend of soothing tunes and poignant storytelling that makes this track a must-listen.
stanzaMeanings: I'm feeling a bit dizzy looking at her. There's no one around, so I'm having tea alone in the shop.
My heart is like a storm, and you are the reason for my breathlessness.
I want it to be as sweet as a love song. Why did you tie me down when I was just relaxing?
Arranged marriage is really tough. I don't need Manoja or Saroja.
I'm feeling a bit dizzy looking at her. There's no one around, so I'm having tea alone in the shop.
Like a fish caught in a net, I got trapped and fell into a mess.
It's not just anyone, it's a unique situation that I'm in here.
You walk like a king, and that's why I got caught in this trap.
You have taken my heart away. Now I feel completely lost.
There's nothing on the matrimony sites, nothing at all.
Arranged marriage is really tough. I don't need Manoja or Saroja.
Is this life just a cycle of birth and death?
One evening of dizziness can lead to a deadly fate.
In my life, it's like a tournament, like the IPL.
They are making fun of me, but I just laugh it off.
Looking at the horoscope, they are creating chaos.
Arranged marriage is really tough. I don't need Manoja or Saroja.
I'm feeling a bit dizzy looking at her. There's no one around, so I'm having tea alone in the shop.
My heart is like a storm, and you are the reason for my breathlessness.
I want it to be as sweet as a love song. Why did you tie me down when I was just relaxing?
Arranged marriage is really tough. I don't need Manoja or Saroja.
